title: inula altissima
intro: Inula altissima, also known as the giant elecampane or elephant's foot, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is rich in inulin, a type of prebiotic fiber that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Inula altissima include soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Inula altissima can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and dried roots, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
